items.headline: Goodman's watchful eye from behind plate paying off with ABS challenges

news_items.headline: Tigers' Skubal to have surgery on left elbow
news_items.summary: Tigers ace and two-time defending American League Cy Young Award winner Tarik Skubal will need surgery for loose bodies in his left elbow, manager A.J. Hinch said.

news_items.headline: Longtime Yankees radio voice Sterling dies at 87
news_items.summary: John Sterling, the radio voice of the New York Yankees for parts of 36 seasons, has died. He was 87.

news_items.headline: Boone: Sterling a 'giant' who 'did it his own way'...
news_items.summary: "A giant in the sport," Yankees manager Aaron Boone said in reflecting on the life of John Sterling, the legendary radio broadcaster who died Monday at age 87. Aaron Judge said Sterling "brought the New York theater to the ballpark."

news_items.headline: Anthony returning to Boston to have hand checked
news_items.summary: Roman Anthony will return to Boston to have his right hand examined by a team doctor after exiting Monday night's 5-4 win against the Tigers with discomfort in his wrist.

news_items.headline: Astros C Diaz off to IL with left oblique injury
news_items.summary: Catcher Yainer Diaz, 27, who is hitting .248 with two home runs, will be heading to the injured list with an oblique injury after hurting his left oblique during batting practice ahead of the Houston Astros' 8-3 loss to the Los Angeles Dodgers on Monday.

news_items.headline: Athletics get catcher Heim from Braves for cash
news_items.summary: The Athletics acquired switch-hitting catcher Jonah Heim from the Braves for cash on Monday night.

news_items.headline: Judge: Volpe call 'tough,' know he'll be motivated...
news_items.summary: Yankees manager Aaron Boone spoke Monday about the decision to option shortstop Anthony Volpe to Triple A, with Aaron Judge calling the move "tough" but acknowledging, "I know he's going to be more motivated than ever to come back here."

news_items.headline: MLB Injury Report: Ronald Acuña Jr. sidelined with hamstring strain, Jackson Chourio shines in season debut
news_items.summary: Jorge Montanez breaks down all of the relevant injury news around the league over the last week.

news_items.headline: Brewers' Jackson Chourio goes 4 for 4 in his 2026 debut after coming off injured list
news_items.summary: Chourio collected at least 20 homers and 20 steals in each of his first two seasons in the major leagues.

news_items.headline: Olney: John Sterling was the perfect voice for the...
news_items.summary: Whether New York's longtime radio voice was celebrating a win or frustrated with the team, you always knew the score.

Braves hit four homers but drop series opener in Seattle, 5-4
news_items.summary: The Braves saw their winning streak come to an end on Monday night in Seattle, falling to the Mariners, 5-4, despite hitting four homers and leading 4-0 at one point. Walt Weiss has been terrific this year, but his very questionable decision in the sixth inning turned the game upside down. With the Braves up […]

news_items.headline: Mets' David Peterson turns in another solid outing against Rockies as reliever
news_items.summary: The Mets are at an interesting crossroads with David Peterson who turned in another solid outing from the bullpen on Monday against the Colorado Rockies.
